items.text: Danced without leaving room for Jesus?
items.help: This is a joking phrase from school dance rules. It means dancing very close to another person, with little or no space between your bodies.

items.text: Kissed a non-family member on the lips?

items.help: A hickey is a temporary mark on the skin caused by kissing or sucking.

items.text: Kissed or been kissed on the breast?

items.help: Below the belt means the genital area or upper inner thigh area.

items.text: Kissed for more than two hours consecutively?
Seen or been seen by another person in a sensual context?
Masturbated to a picture or video?
Masturbated while someone else was in the room?
Gone through the motions of intercourse while fully dressed?
Undressed or been undressed by a MPS (member of the preferred sex)?
items.help: MPS means member of the preferred sex: someone of the sex or gender you are attracted to.
MPS means member of the preferred sex: someone of the sex or gender you are attracted to.

items.text: Fondled or had your butt cheeks fondled?
Fondled or had your breasts fondled?
Fondled or had your genitals fondled?

items.help: Blue balls is slang for testicular discomfort after sexual arousal without orgasm.

items.text: Had an orgasm due to someone else’s manipulation?
Sent a sexually explicit text or instant message?
Sent or received sexually explicit photographs?
Engaged in sexually explicit activity over video chat?
Cheated on a significant other during a relationship?

items.help: Contraceptives are products or medicine used to reduce the chance of pregnancy, such as condoms or birth control pills.

items.text: Used a sex toy with a partner?
Spent the night with a MPS?
items.help: MPS means member of the preferred sex: someone of the sex or gender you are attracted to.

items.text: Been walked in on while engaging in a sexual act?
Kicked a roommate out to commit a sexual act?
Ingested alcohol in a non-religious context?
Faked sobriety to parents or teachers?
Had severe memory loss due to alcohol?
Used a drug stronger than marijuana?
Used methamphetamine, crack cocaine, PCP, horse tranquilizers or heroin?
items.help: This item lists several hard drugs: methamphetamine, crack cocaine, PCP, ketamine-like animal tranquilizers, and heroin.

items.text: Been sent to the office of a principal, dean or judicial affairs representative for a disciplinary infraction?
Been put on disciplinary probation or suspended?
Had the police called on you?
Had sexual intercourse three or more times in one night?

items.help: 69 is a sexual position where two people perform oral sex on each other at the same time, with their bodies arranged head-to-toe.

items.text: Had sexual intercourse 10 or more times?
Had sexual intercourse in four or more positions?
Had sexual intercourse with a stranger or person you met within 24 hours?
Had sexual intercourse in a motor vehicle?
Had sexual intercourse in a swimming pool or hot tub?
Had sexual intercourse in a bed not belonging to you or your partner?
Had sexual intercourse while you or your partner’s parents were in the same home?
Had sexual intercourse with non-participating third party in the same room?

items.help: The mile high club means having sex on an airplane while in flight.

items.text: Participated in a “booty call” with a partner whom you were not in a relationship with?
items.help: A booty call is a casual invitation or meetup for sex, not a romantic relationship.

items.text: Traveled 100 or more miles for the primary purpose of sexual intercourse?
Had sexual intercourse with a partner with a 3 or more year age difference?
Had sexual intercourse with a virgin?
Had sexual intercourse without a condom?
Had a STI test due to reasonable suspicion?
items.help: STI means sexually transmitted infection. This asks about getting tested because you had a realistic reason to suspect exposure.
STI means sexually transmitted infection, an infection that can be passed through sexual contact.
A threesome is a sexual encounter involving three people.
An orgy is a group sexual event involving several people.

items.text: Had two or more distinct acts of sexual intercourse with two or more people within 24 hours?
Had sexual intercourse with five or more partners?
Been photographed or filmed during sexual intercourse by yourself or others?
Paid or been paid for a sexual act?

items.help: Voyeurism means watching people in private or sexual situations without their consent.
Incest means sexual activity between close family members.
Bestiality means sexual activity involving an animal.
